title: Hit Feedback
description: Add particles (mostly blood and gore) as hit feedback.
body:
Add particles (mostly blood and gore) as hit feedback. Gore texture is automatically fetched from entity texture (including player skins).   ![Hit feedback when hit with a sword](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_ba33580a-d53d-4274-8909-a287c85ee64a.png) Hit feedback when hit with a sword   ![Hit feedback when hit with a bow](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_3971585c-27f5-4086-a074-44772604c31d.png) Hit feedback when hit with a bow   ![Hit feedback when hit with a shotgun (multiple pellets per shot)](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_d9ab3025-6d5d-4cc6-b21e-0858e3668c04.png) Hit feedback when hit with a shotgun (multiple pellets per shot)   ![Rapid hit with slash blades](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_fc3df8a1-229c-4810-af19-c18c069ef63a.png) Rapid hit with slash blades   ![Spark when hitting metal enemies (controlled by tag)](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_14a86423-a9c9-4183-ba4d-318b86947989.png) Spark when hitting metal enemies (controlled by tag)   ![Bone piece when hit skeletonal enemies](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_67dad4a9-faaa-46da-a104-d142f6ad5720.png) Bone piece when hit skeletonal enemies Contact:
